channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: iExec RLC — 14 replies — 18.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
iExec RLC

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-03-02 03:35 UTC

OP

When will this digital oil pump like physical oil?

Early replies (first 3)

61920216
>>61919880
just wait 2 years and it will 4x

61920259
>>61919880
Soon

61920494
I can’t believe i am still holding this…

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61920746
>>61920494
please tell me you didn't buy at $2 you were supposed to take profits anon...you should be accumulating now and selling at $1.20

61920840
>>61919880
RETURN OF THE OILERS
NELLY FOR WORLD PRESIDENT
RLC TO $100, LFG!!!

61920930
Sold a while back, but then I bought this when I had no money so who cares.

61921104
Why is it dropping in value over this 6 months? Is there some secret bearish news about it? I used to be in it before the coinbase dump but sold for living expenses and stuff. Thinking of getting back into it but dont want to catch a falling knife

61921208
>>61921104
Idk anon. This was the first shit coin I ever believed in and held for multi years. I sold like 3 months before the Coinbase listing after buying during the mania phase of the 2017 bull run. Needless to say I lost money and I have a very strong hate for this coin and everyone who shills it. Having said all this, they are getting in the privacy scene with TEE and shit. Could be another grift. Also I want to make sweet love to Nelly for hours.

61921224
>>61919880
>digital oil

61921260
>>61920494
haha I can't believe I doubled downed and boughted mored
>>61921208
She is quite attractive.
Question is, all this TEE shit, it needs to ACTUALLY LAUNCH and be used.. real demand

61921277
Haha I forgot about this shit. I got like 15 tokens in some wallet somewhere. Hopefully you pump to that $8700 value or whatever so I can pay off my truck

61922291
>>61921277
checked. I'm skeptical. wish I was not....

61922301
L M F A O
L O L
T O P F U C K I N G K E K!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

61922385
>>61921277
>>61921208
This coin has been over $3 multiple times for months at a time, bots love this coin don't believe the FUD i know their website's a joke but this is clown world everything is fake none of these coins have any utility other than monero

item.title: Why are bulls celebrating when ONLY buttcorn is going up? — 10 replies — 10.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why are bulls celebrating when ONLY buttcorn is going up?

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-03-02 03:26 UTC

OP

I thought mumu celebrates when everyone profits from spot? No?

Early replies (first 3)

61917208
punch is going up too

61917237
Bitcoin is all that matters

61917264
>>61917237
Even though you'll only get (at best) 2x out of it from here?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61917303
>>61917237
This. Cryptoboard. Go seethe in your lil tranny rock collecting thread.

61917698
>>61917179

No. The investors are Bitcoin maxis, it's only the gamblers that are in crypto to find the next 100x shitcoin.

61917966
>>61917179
>>61917264
why are you posting threads on /biz/ when you don't have any positions open on anything, jew?

61917969
Permabulls are dumb as hell crash it down hard and buy at the bottom

61918022
>>61917264
250k is a 4x, bobo math?

61921716
>>61917179
>buttcorn is going up
is it?

61922355
>>61917264
Yes.

item.title: *ring ring* Anon, I know its your Sunday and all... — 6 replies — 9.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
*ring ring* Anon, I know its your Sunday and all...

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-03-02 03:42 UTC

OP

*ring ring*
Anon, I know its your Sunday and all... but I need you in tomorrow morning at approx. 06:00h. We have stake holders from Asia meeting us and I need you to tour them around the facility and then show them our production and explain to them how me make sure CP and CPk values are in specification.
Thanks anon. Please accept the time slot 05:30-11:30 tonight in Outlook.
See you tomorrow.

Early replies (first 3)

61921148
Am I the only person who thinks it's sad and pathetic for old men to be muscular?

61921175
>>61921148
CEO GIGA COCK BILLIONAIRE Bezos with the eyes of a hawk and hearing of a bat runs of in the ddirection of where he heared some shrill faggots voice saying:
>"Am I the only person who thinks it's sad and pathetic for old men to be muscular?"

He finds the cubicle and quickly spots the chicken neck looking queer.
>"Could you please repeat what you just said employee Nr. 5372831 ?"

61921198
Funnily enough, an AWS DC got tagged by Iran. KEK

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61921211
>>61921175
"Ahem! I said: Am I the only person who thinks it's sad and pathetic for old men to be muscular?! Can you hear that, Bozos?"

61921529
>>61921140
>*ring ring*
my work number is off starting Friday 5 pm until Monday 9 am. They don’t have my personal number.
Just €5 extra per month.

61922407
>>61921529
*hangs up*
..
...
*ring ring*
*knock thump*
Employee Nr. 633882, Im at the front door! I need you to acknowledge tomorrows assignment.

item.title: First Polkadot Halving — 8 replies — 5.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
First Polkadot Halving

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-03-02 02:52 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 13 days until the halving. At the same time more and more activity is happening on the hub. Smart contracts (EVM & PVM) are getting launched steadily . https://data.parity.io/polkadothub?relay-chain=polkadot&chains=

Early replies (first 3)

61917634
>>61917593

Im fucking JACKED

61917680
scam alert

>token will rug

61917695
>>61917680
HEEEELLLL YEAAAA BROOOOTHEEEERRRR WOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61919159
>>61917593
The fuck is this shitcoin?

61919467
>>61917680

Go away linkie

61919549
>>61917680
You're thinking of other coins
>>61919159
Bait, but if you want a friendly reminder, its the official coin of /biz/

61922227
HEEEELLLL YEAAAA BROOOOTHEEEERRRR WOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO

61922267
No one cares. No one is buying. Retail is long gone. All narratives in crypto in 2026 are just exchanges spoofing volume and wash trading between each other. Lmao.

item.title: Redpill or blackpill me about arweave... — 4 replies — 2.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Redpill or blackpill me about arweave...

Open thread • Replies: 4 • Updated: 2026-03-02 02:36 UTC

OP

Redpill or blackpill me about arweave... Is it a good entry rn? Its supposed to be an ICP without gatekeeping... But the price action is pretty shitty rn...is it being suppressed? This should be a top 100 coin.

Early replies (first 3)

61919696
>>61919689
you should be studying polygons and their interior angles and sums. instead you're asking about some shitcoin. i don't kid, i doubt shitcoin #215423414 is worth a shit. do you even know the square root of 2 little dawg?

61919698
favorite hexagonal number?

61922215
>>61919689
bigwits have liked arweave for a while. are there enough integrations for price to go up?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61922218
>>61919696
>>61919698
i'm rather ignorant of geometry, what's a good hexagonal number used commonly in business and finance?

item.title: Anyone else getting the itch? — 69 replies — 26.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Anyone else getting the itch?

Open thread • Replies: 69 • Updated: 2026-03-02 01:44 UTC

OP

The big boys'll go back up, that's guaranteed money. But some others will 10x, 100x, 1000x. I'm feelin' like it's SHIB's turn.

Early replies (first 3)

61900851
>>61899833
Checked

61900872
>>61899833
I'll just keep buying small amounts of it for the rest of my life, and see what happens.

61900948
>>61899833
i believe in shib

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61912644
Come on SHIB let's moon!

61912668
Toad

61912724
>>61912644
Checked and
>You just know
Shibs on sale again!

61912911
this thread smells like india
>YES SAAAR BUY TOAD SAAR IT IS NEW DOGE SAAR

61912963
>>61912911
It’s the next shib not doge, retard

61912969
I boughted more Shib today. It ain't easy being a good boy in these doggy-dog times.

61913401
>>61912969
I never thought it would be this low again. I shlopped another 50m today too.

61913435
>>61913401
Could’ve got close to 1T toad for that price

61915673
>>61912963
Man... can you imagine the seethe on this board if this turns out to be true.

61917994
>>61913435
I made that pic kek

61917997
I had to sell all my toad though

61918166
>>61917997
What if it does what it’s intended to do and you sold? I’m not sure I could live with myself. I’d definitely rather lose the money than live with that type of fuckup for the rest of my life

61918170
Don't make last cycles mistake anon
Stay away from memecoins and bitcoin, 100% in ETH or XMR

61919529
Shib is fucking dead

61919535
>>61919529
yeah, kinda is
Thankfully i still got in early enough that there was never any chance of not making a profit despite missing out on the big gains through greed but there's nothing but a slow bleed right now and i've seen nothing that means it might pump again

61921116
Bro imagine buying that

61921137
Not today

61921143
No such thing as a free lunch

61921144
>>61899833
none of these shitcoins are gonna do big movements again retard

61921169
>>61921144
No such thing as a free lunch

61921558
Just bought some more boys, let's go

61921644
>>61901257
This already rugged.

61921961
>>61921558
Ummm based?

61921988
>>61921644
Checked and true

61922004
kek turd killer still being shilled here in 2026
lmfao nice AI pics btw

61922014
>>61922004

61922070
>>61922004
You have 2 more weeks wagie

61922078
I hope you don’t buy toad

item.title: ""THE FUTURE OF FINANCE"" — 8 replies — 15.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
""THE FUTURE OF FINANCE""

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-03-02 03:50 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

61921606
>>61921599
>stablecoins
>exchanges
Deserved.

61921612
>>61921599
What is slippage and who would set it to 99%.... Probably above 100 iq bigbrain bros fr fr no cap!

61921797
>>61921599
why did you repost this shit from the last decade?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61922103
That’s why I use Rubic unironically. It’s the only swapping service that has decent privacy features.

61922206
>>61921599
Proof of stake was a retarded concept in hindsight

61922296
>>61921599
should have used cow swap or curve or whatever
>>61922103
rubic's website, like chainlink, stopped working with brave browser integration.
rubic is a scam anyway

61922350
https://www.lightspark.com/glossary/stablecoin-sandwich
thanks for this op, one less way i can get rekt from now on

61922425
>>61921599
once you add all the losses from smart contract exploits and MEV bot shenanigans it becomes quickly apparent that only a fucking moron would expect institutions to adopt eth as a transaction layer.

item.title: WOAH What year is it where am I? /biz/?? when did they add an iz? — 80 replies — 14.2/hr
item.content:encoded:

Open thread • Replies: 80 • Updated: 2026-03-01 22:44 UTC

OP

WOAH
What year is it where am I?
/biz/?? when did they add an iz?

Early replies (first 3)

61906377
>>61906370
Whatever..
Finance?
Ummm okay
Ill brought you a gift /b/iz/?

61906378
>>61906370
Thats epic wing guy. Idk why its called that, but he's pretty epic.

61906379
>>61906377
Well would you look at that dubs
were off to a great start

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61909219
>>61906449

61909264
>>61906449

61909521
Bretty good thread

61909548
More like this. Based.

61909664
>>61906370
What memecoin is this?

61910663
Postan in an oldfag bread

61912801
Best thread rn

61914222
>>61906370

>>61906370

>not gif
>not 400x400

Regardless, I appreciate the thread and the effort. Weirdly, I was thinking of EFG just the other day.

61914231
best content on the 4chinz for years

61914300
I have been using 4chan since 2008 basically every day

61915467
>>61914222

Wasnt his name Optimized Gif Dude

It was low bandwidth versions of popular memes.

61915797
>>61914300
Same but make it 2004 and few months of break once in a while

61917312
>>61906458
>>61907301
I would really love to go back to post dial up but pre smartphone internet world and just stay there, basically everything past that point has been a downgrade and the few things that have improved aren't worth it at all

61917331
The saddest thing is that as you age and age you realize that the new gens will say the same thing. Their real quality is what they know too.

61917585
>incorrect file names
Salvia officinalis in fields

61917849
>>61906370
>jpg

61918416
great thread. i miss /b/.

61918426
This was not spam.

61918486
>>61909212
Anxiety? What? There’s nothing scary about that photo

61918948
>>61906370
Good thread. It's been a while since OP wasn't a faggot

61918968
>>61918416

It’s a cesspit now. Dont even look. Man I’m 46! Where did the time go.

61920110
>>61918968
dang unc, go outside

61920123
Great thread, man.

61920179
>>61906449
>oopsie
winrar

61920392
>>61906370
efg go up. ascend into higher realms of meme existence

61920744
>>61907301
if the world just ended in 2016 we'd be a lot better off
nothing has been good since then

61921246
>>61906387
Kek'd irl

>>61906426
>>61906431
LOL

61921344
>>61906458
It still is. Ever seen that image of the Chinese kid with a boot on his head, then the next image shows that his arm was in the boot? That's you. You can take the boot off your head and laugh at anytime.

item.title: PYPL merger edition 1 — 79 replies — 13.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
PYPL merger edition 1

Open thread • Replies: 79 • Updated: 2026-03-01 22:36 UTC

OP

Here we go!

Early replies (first 3)

61891698
Do it Ryan.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61901344
Looked into it and the fundamentals look bullish. Solid cash flow, alot of cash on hand. Possible buyout on the horizon and stock has taken a beating. Venmo alone is a huge asset. Just bought a bag.

61901538
>>61901344

61902103
https://x.com/ArarNecmettin/status/2026726277357695290?s=20
120-200$

61902172
I bought this shit at $52 like an idiot. I don't want a merger or a buy out. I want them to get their shit together and expand. They own venmo, the need to capitalize on that and take over the little fish with buyer protection.

61902704
>>61891943
What I am going to own Game Stop stock?!

61903001
VOLUME RECORD

61903514
>>61897932
Stop giving jews money

61904108
I bought the pico bottom but only threw in $1000

61904711
>>61904697
HOLY FUUUUCK
OOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO

61904727
>>61891742

I don't think so, only because they claimed they didn't have any big acquisitions planned for the rest of the year

61908061

no merger.
we are fucked

61909693
>>61909665
the gap will be filled

61909824
>>61904697

61910124
>>61909824

61916113

61918275

61919240
>>61918275

61919338
>>61892826
>$300
impressive

61919350
>>61918275
>d
the CEO will get his big cut only at $83 dollar share price MINIMUM.
look at warner bros that shit went from below $10 to now beeing baught at $30
If Paypal gets aquired it will be atleast $100

61921315

item.title: do NOT buy the dip. wait a few more days — 24 replies — 10.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
do NOT buy the dip. wait a few more days

Open thread • Replies: 24 • Updated: 2026-03-02 02:04 UTC

OP

do NOT buy the dip. wait a few more days

Early replies (first 3)

61915307
ok see you in the morning when its over

61915320
>>61915296
Usually we bottom some weeks before blood moon so it can't be much longer now. I bought already. Maybe it keeps going down but I don't really care, seems like a solid entry point.

61915331
>>61915320
I wont get 1500 eth this year :(

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61915334
>the implications are dire saaaaar

61915336
>>61915331
Never say never

61916345
>>61915296
my balls are in a dire need of sucking

61916352
>>61915296
What dip retard

61916677
>>61915296
> implications of a moon doing moon things
> judging things by what the moon does
are we still cave men or what?

61916684
>>61915296
3 is my favorite number.
BLESS THE HOLY THREES!

61916686
>>61916677
>are we still cave men or what?
We are not. We are those who know that they are still cavemen, and we're taking their money.

61917604
How did astronomy line up with the gregorian calendar and our base-10 number system like that

61918081
>>61917604
they didn't line up
you lined up

61918087
>>61918081
that's deep bro

61918095
>>61915296
>do NOT liquidate me
say good bye jane

61920722
>>61918081
That's some deep Gurdjieff shit

61920756
>>61915296
It's also a worm moon. Crypto-Winters over. One last big dump before we gigapump
Personally I'm buying now with more capital set aside just incase

61920825
>>61916677
The planets lined up and USA went to war with Iran. Jews operate on this shit

61920993
>>61915320
Pretty based. I am holding out just a bit longer, but am really close.

61921669
>>61916677
>>61920825

Random or nah? Anyway, I entered several positions last week because of the eclipses, full moon and retrogrades this month. Now look where we are today in the world.

Jews definitely operate on this shit.

61921680
>>61915296
I bought the dip, I've been buying the dip, I'll buy the dip again.

61921855
>>61915296
And yet you would make fun of women for astrology?

61921933
Buy full

Sell new

61921979
>>61921933
Checked.

61922130
>>61915296
>>61920825

item.title: Hyperliquid >decentralized perp and spot exchange >trading silver, gold and crude oil on weekends during a war >genius l… — 28 replies — 9.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Hyperliquid >decentralized perp and spot exchange >trading silver, gold and crude oil on weekends during a war >genius l…

Open thread • Replies: 28 • Updated: 2026-03-02 01:32 UTC

OP

Hyperliquid

>decentralized perp and spot exchange
>trading silver, gold and crude oil on weekends during a war
>genius level founders. Harvard, MIT and caltech.
>no vc funding from day 1
>31% geneis airdop tokens to users minting millionaires for early usrs.
>97% all platfrom fees spent and buy HYPE tokens from open market and sent to burned wallet.


Holding HYPE is comfy AF

Early replies (first 3)

61918612
>>61918597
Buy an ad.
CLEAN IT UP JANNIES

61918623
>>61918597
>Shilled by literally all of Twitter fags including scammers like Arthur
>Token not needed
Yeah, no.

61918628
>>61918623
why don't people say "stock not needed". its a crypto company and the coin is basically the stock.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61918695
>>61918623
The coin might not be needed but they use it to buy and burn 98% of the profits so number go up and it’s destined to sit in the top 5 by EOY

61918707
It probably has the best price action out there. And it's not listed on most major exchanges

>>61918695
Isn't hype used as gas for the hyperliquid chain?

61918832
>>61918623
hype is great. non kyc leverage trading??? plus it had a multitude of apps being built to take advantage of it from fully automated leverage trading apps like jest to shit like dreamcash. Claude being used on it too. its here to stay

61918837
>>61918832
More info about those apps? I thought it was only used for the hyperliquid exchange

61918843
>>61918597
Looks like asters butt plug.

61918925
>>61918597
shit volume on commodities
have fun getting adled
dot hl are insufferable fags

61919310
>>61918612
HYPEBTC has a nice bullflag setup

61919323
>>61918623
>token not needed

All 97% of all fees generated by the Hyperliquid exchange is used to buy HYPE tokens and gets sent to burn address.
$1.3 Billion is fees so far. All on chain.

0xfefefefefefefefefefefefefefefefefefefefe

61919354
>>61919323
Is the hype token used as gas for the chain?

61919376
Fuck hyperliquid, they forced cz the good guy to giganuke the market (like he did in 2022 to destroy ftx/sbf), but these fuckers are still alive.
They need to disappear so cz can allow the market to recover.

61919383
>>61919376
I don't hold any hype but I use the exchange on a daily basis and it works better than even centralized exchanges. It's the best product out there.

61919391
>>61919354
Yes. Hype is used as gas on the HyperEVM chain.

There are two chains in Hyperliquid ecosystem.

HyperCore - trading engine. No gas needed. Pay with trading fees which is used to buy and burn HYPE.

HyperEVM - smart-contract layer. HYPE used as bas.

61920112
I was thinking about grabbing a bag in late Jan and then it pumped again. Serves me right for wanting to buy this under 20 burgerbux

61920124
>>61920112
Same, bro. I just hold btc and trade on hyperliquid. I wanted to get myself a good back of hype, it's the best project out there and the team are not niggers. They want hype to go up. This weekends pump is because everybody is using it to trade crypto and commodities.

One of the few chains that is actually used. No marketing, no bullshit kantian philosophy or any kind of german idealism talk like Sergey or Charles hoskinson

61920169
How do I even buy Hype in the US? I need to use a VPN?

61920469
>>61919376

61920537
can i trade spot btc on there?

61920572
>>61920537
yes. Crypto, stocks, commodities... both spot and perps

61920574
Forex too

61921651
>>61920169
it's on Coinbase now starting Feb 2026. Not sure if it's available in USA.

VPN is very useful. expressvpn

61921686
Funny , this thread popped up because hype's about the moon

61921966
>>61918612
tell that to bloomberg you stupid nigger

61921981
>>61918623
>hurr im not going to buy this multi-billion marketcap token because [insert random person i dont like] is in it!!!
You are thinking like a pleb here and will simply miss out on profits this way.

61922017
>>61918597
I only have 250 hype and refuse to buy up here. It has to retrace back to the low 20's at some point.

Also shilling hype here is a waste. This entire board is so underwater on their bags they're in the mariana trenches.
>Link generals
>Avi generals
>BBBY/GME

I said this to myself earlier this year but Jeff and Vitalik are truly the last 2 people in this entire fucking space that still hasn't soul their souls yet

61922034
>>61921981
Look up GMX.

Pffftttttt
Adem won. HAHAHHAHAHHA
Their hubris truly was their downfall.

61918952
adem
fucking
won

61918953
Yet i am not selling, ever

61919003
>>61918151
Aaaaaaaand he's selling..again

61919630
Adem WON
cuckolds LOST

61921629
>>61918151
thank you sergey!

61921717
DELULU GANNNNNNNGGG OOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO

61921965
>Chainlinks former counsel joins SEC crypto task force

61922183

item.title: So Tradingview is over $400 US a month if you want to see 1 min charts? — 27 replies — 8.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
So Tradingview is over $400 US a month if you want to see 1 min charts?

Open thread • Replies: 27 • Updated: 2026-03-02 01:11 UTC

OP

So Tradingview is over $400 US a month if you want to see 1 min charts? I was told I need Ultimate, where can you see and trade 1 min charts for free or cheaper than that?

Early replies (first 3)

61918479
$461 worth of product but they are willing to give it to you for free for 1 month, thats a $461 giveaway.

61918533
>>61918479
Even free tradingview has minute charts, you have to go up to premium if you want seconds based intervals. I don't know where your getting that price from. I'm showing $240 for ultimate if you go with the most expensive billed monthly option. But if you seriously want tradingview, get whatever minimum plan you can stand until black friday, that's when they have their once a year huge sale on annual plans.

61918574
>>61918474
Trading view sucks so much it's unreal. No wonder topstep made their own trading platform.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61918578
>>61918474
imagine paying $400 a month to see 1m charts when you could just $400 long

61918579
>trading 1 min charts

utterly pointless lol

61918641
>>61918474
>>61918479
>>61918533
>>61918574
>>61918578
>Paying for something that is free

do retards really lmao

anything below 4hours is for retards anyway

61918644
>>61918474
>15 watchlist alerts
>ability to BUY professional market data

61918648
>>61918579
>>61918641
You stupid faggots realize that a lot of people make hundreds of thousands or millions of dollars a year trading nothing but 1 - 5 minute charts right?

61918660
>>61918648
no they dont

61918681
>>61918648
proof?

61918744
>>61918660
>>61918681
Lmao, sheltered retards... why are you on /biz? Fabio Valentini is considered one of the current best traders in the world and trades strictly on one and five minute charts. He is one among thousands... you guys are so fucking clueless it's embarrassing. Don't talk about trading ever again.

61918761
>>61918744
>saaar please pay $500 for trading view saaar need more indicators and 1 minute chart to be good trader

kek you fool

61918799
>>61918761
I get 1 minute amd any timeframe charts for free on my trading platform, don't need or use trading view nor do I give any fucks if somebody pays them or not. Did you want to address how wrong and uninformed you are about scalping and traders who make more in a year than you will in your entire life on one minute time frames or shift goal posts even further?

61918807
>>61918648
and how many don't?

61918845
>>61918474
Tradingjew kek

61918847
>>61918641
Pay up tards!

61918850
>>61918744
I have seen many cex and another jew corpo shill on biz, but tv kek, we have reached rock bottom, iq wise.

61918997
>>61918474
Binance?

61919653
>>61918648
I trade the 1 nanosecond chart

61919657
>>61918474
you need pro to see 1 second charts, which costs 60/mo, but if you buy on holdays is only like 216/yr instead of 720. the ultimate tier is to see tick charts, which are very cool, but certainly not worth it for someone who makes this thread.

61919663
>>61918474
1-minute is available for free on my end just fine, just checked. I see the 2-minute, 10-minute, and sub-1-minute charts are all locked behind a subscription, which is the same case as it's always been.

61919664
>>61918474
What's the point of that? You get 1m charts for free, and 1m charts are kind of useless.

61919789
>>61919657
My broker shows the tape but it comes in blocks, not sure if it's because my computer/their javashit software sucks or if it's just the data limitation.
I got lucky scalping a few times but it always felt like luck, and if you're too slow you're now stuck "swing trading" a quickly losing position.

61919871
>>61919789
what platform? regardless check your quote speed, you may have different options like real time, 1 second delay and so on

61920118
>>61918648
yes sir we have the realize sar

61921849
>>61918474
is there an alternative for tradingview?

61921956
wow.. no one actually trades here huh...
market data is priced differently depending if you're a registered or work in a registered.. tl;dr ur part of the finance industry
you should not be paying more than $50 for everything you'd ever need in each trading region

btw.. yeah you need fast, realtime not-just-BATS charts for timing, and there's lost of info there too

61921230

61921234

61921244
>>61921196

61921256
>>61921244

61921852

61921900
>>61921135

61921957

61921958

61921962
>>61921921

61921970
>>61921121

61922047

61922079
